race.comment: SOOBOOCO (2) hasn't been all that far away of late, the latest offering a midfield finish over this distance at Tamworth where he settled back in the pack. Raced once here at this trip and was successful. Very fit and from an ideal draw it all points towards a peak performance. TRYANZA (8) is knocking on the door with a couple of minor placings recently, both around today's trip at Grafton. Gets in well under this weight scale so it will be no surprise to see him fighting out the finish. Progressive filly COME ON GLAMOUR (7) made it three wins from her last five starts when she led from barrier rise and just held on over this course and distance last time out. Has the gate speed to overcome the wide draw. Right in contention again. THE LUPERCAL (5) resumes. Will improve on what he does here but might be worth throwing in the exotics. ZENTI (3) is back from an eight-month lay-off. Has been in the money at four of his five first-up runs which brings him under notice.
